creator: asiciliano@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi,

I use inactive for almost 1 year so I don't know if it is a problem or a new feature.

Anyway the links like https://man.freebsd.org/curs_add_wch/3x (several in https://alfonsosiciliano.gitlab.io/posts/2021-11-03-ncurses-manuals.html) seem broken. The problem seems the trailing '3x' (I am absolutely not an expert).

Alfonso
